title: Amazon Basics Smudge Resistant Mini Rectangular Trash Can With Soft-Close Foot Pedal, Brushed Stainless Steel, for Bathroom & small space, 5 L /1.32 Gal, Satin Nickel Finish, 7.3x8.5 x11.8 in (LxWxH)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Small Rectangular Rubbish Bin: Modern-style, 5 litre fingerprint-proof and smudge-resistant brushed stainless steel dustbin with manual foot lever
Lid Design: Soft-close lid of refuse bin reduces noise when closing while minimising wear and tear from rough use
With Heavy-Duty Bucket: Sturdy plastic interior bucket of black bin is removable and easy to wipe clean; for convenient waste disposal
Multi-Purpose: Trash bin ideal for kitchen waste or paper; for use in bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, workspace or office
Dimensions: Compact bin measures ‎21.5 x 18.5 x 30cm / 8.5 x 7.3 x 11.8 inch (LxWxH); height with lid open: 42.8cm / 16.9 inch; item weight: ‎0.95kg / 2 pound
description: From the manufacturer AmazonBasics Dustbin, Satin, 5L Keep waste properly contained and add a touch of modern style to your space with the AmazonBasics Rectangle Soft-Close Dustbin with Steel Bar Pedal. This stainless steel dustbin fits in effortlessly with your existing decor and appliances with its clean, minimal look. Featuring a soft-close lid with a manual foot lever, you’ll enjoy hands-free convenience and ease-of-use every day. Place in the kitchen, bathroom, laundry room, or anywhere a dustbin is necessary, and experience functionality in design. Stainless steel dustbin with manual foot lever Soft-close lid reduces noise Contemporary look fits in well with existing appliances and decor Removable plastic interior bucket Perfect for both home and office Durable Stainless Steel Construction An ideal addition to any home or office, the AmazonBasics dustbin keeps waste neatly enclosed and helps prevent odors from escaping. The container’s stainless steel construction is fingerprint-proof, smudge-resistant, lightweight, and durable. Featuring a heavy-duty plastic interior bucket that can be easily removed for rubbish disposal. Includes non-slip rubber pads on the bottom and a steel tube foot pedal that can last up to 100,000 steps. Quiet, Soft-Close Lid Built to last, the AmazonBasics dustbin minimizes wear and tear from rough use with its special soft-touch lid mechanism. Ultra-quiet with a light, gentle closure, the lid won’t slam down or create startling sounds within your environment. Featuring a stay-open mode for easily removing or replacing liners.
